{{Quote|[]One -- stop calling them «fishfaces». They don't appreciate it, []|[[Naradan D'ulin]], to [[Vilmarh Grahrk]]|<ref name="Deal" />}}
The '''Ootoolans''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Amphibian/Legends|amphibious]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] indigenous to the beautiful aquatic [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Ootoola]]. They generally possessed [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] features, but their skin was a mottled bright green, and their heads were adorned with a fin-like ridge and several finned jowls. Due to their [[Fish/Legends|fish]]-like appearance, members of this species were derogatorily nicknamed «fishfaces» outside Ootoola.<ref name="Deal" /><ref name="CSWE" />

On their homeworld, amid [[Water/Legends|water]] and unusual twisted rocks, the Ootoolans adapted by built their cities within the rocks.<ref name="CSWE" /> One of their most significant cultural creations was the [[Central Palace]], constructed before [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]], which served both as the main residence of the ruling leader and as a temple.<ref name="Deal" />

During the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]], their society was ruled by a [[Theocracy|theocratic]] [[King/Legends|patriarchal]] government. The ruler was expected to strictly adhere to their laws, thereby achieving a certain level of purity.<ref name="CSWE" /> Around [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]],<ref name="NEGC">''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref> a group of dissenters formed the [[Revolutionary Purist Council]] and orchestrated a coup d'état, during which the reigning patriarch and his wife were executed by planted thugs.<ref name="CSWE" /> The rebels then appointed a new patriarch whom they considered to be more «pure». [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Foolookoola]], daughter of the murdered monarchs, was the last heir to the throne. As she was expected to be the Purists' next target, [[Vilmarh Grahrk]] was hired by the remaining loyalists to aid in her evacuation. With his help, and that of her assistant, [[Naradan D'ulin]], the princess escaped to [[Dur Sabon]].<ref name="Deal" />
